title: Kaachtari
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Location |image= |name=Kaachtari |created= |destroyed= |type= |location=[[Haariden]]''[[Jedi Quest: The Master of Disguise]]'' |terrain= |fauna= |flora= |interest= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Are you sure you are fully recovered?"
"Yes. Where are we going?"
"Back to Haariden ... We're going to watch a volcano erupt.|Master [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and Padawan [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]|}} '''Kaachtari''' was an active [[Volcano/Legends|volcano]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Haariden]]. In [[26 BBY/Legends|26 BBY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Jedi Quest: The Master of Disguise]]'' to [[25 BBY/Legends|25 BBY]]. The novel indicates that the volcano erupted a [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before its events, equating to [[26 BBY/Legends|26 BBY]]. it experienced a massive eruption, in the midst of a world-wide civil war. {{Nature-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Jedi Quest: The Master of Disguise]]'' ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Kaachtari }} [[Category:Haariden locations]] [[Category:Volcanoes]]
